query:
UPDATE deals SET 
  score = CASE
    WHEN id = 510001 THEN 0.71  -- Doral Industrial Electric: solid SDE, established
    WHEN id = 510002 THEN 0.63  -- Biscayne Bay Yacht: niche, seasonal risk
    WHEN id = 510003 THEN 0.68  -- Sawgrass Pool & Spa: recurring, SBA-eligible
    WHEN id = 510004 THEN 0.74  -- Hialeah Precision Machine: strong ops moat
    WHEN id = 510005 THEN 0.82  -- Coral Gables Commercial HVAC: high TIDE match, distressed exit
    WHEN id = 540001 THEN 0.59  -- Las Olas Marine Canvas: niche, key-man risk
    WHEN id = 540002 THEN 0.78  -- Pompano Pest & Termite: recurring revenue, route-based
    WHEN id = 540003 THEN 0.66  -- Doral Commercial Landscape: recurring, thin margin
    WHEN id = 1560009 THEN 0.85 -- Miami Metro HVAC: high cashflow, TIDE match 94%
    WHEN id = 1560010 THEN 0.81 -- Dallas Elite Commercial Cleaning: SBA-eligible, recurring
    WHEN id = 1560011 THEN 0.77 -- Houston Rapid Plumbing: strong ops, SBA-eligible
    WHEN id = 1560012 THEN 0.83 -- Atlanta Bright Electrical: defense spending signal match
    WHEN id = 1560013 THEN 0.72 -- Miami Coastal Pest Control: route-based, recurring
    WHEN id = 1560014 THEN 0.69 -- Dallas Logistics Dispatch: supply chain nearshoring signal
    WHEN id = 1560015 THEN 0.76 -- Atlanta Medical Staffing: healthcare, institutional
    ELSE score
  END,
  redFlagCount = CASE
    WHEN id IN (510002, 540001) THEN 2  -- niche/seasonal
    WHEN id IN (510001, 510003, 540003, 1560013, 1560014) THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END,
  stage = CASE
    WHEN id IN (1560009, 1560012, 510005) THEN 'high_priority'
    WHEN id IN (1560010, 1560011, 540002, 1560015, 510004) THEN 'qualified'
    ELSE stage
  END;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v1wvYFABP51Dvh.c007ac915537 --database GeCPeFFiEBRZFpk6xckkAz --execute
